data.content: K-21 plan: TOCTOU fix for concurrent rewriteEnv. Add per-namespace Version (uint64) to EnvManifest. saveManifest takes an exclusive flock on secrets/thimble.json covering full read-modify-write; before merging it re-reads the manifest from disk and verifies (app,env) Version still matches what we loaded; bumps on save. List/Render take shared lock. Build internal/store/lock.go wrapping unix.Flock LOCK_EX/LOCK_SH (build-tagged for windows fallback). Tests in store_test.go: two goroutines mutating different keys both succeed eventually but second loses-race fails cleanly; same key second fails; lock released on panic via defer.
